description: Sample 5-year trajectory for mesial TLE progressing to DRE

encounters.text: 28-year-old with focal impaired awareness seizures since age 12. MRI: left hippocampal sclerosis. Started levetiracetam 500mg BID.
Seizure-free 4 months on levetiracetam. Good response.
Breakthrough seizures 3-4/month. Added lacosamide. ILAE DRE criteria not yet met.
SEEG confirms left mesial temporal onset. Failed 3 ASMs. DRE confirmed. Surgical evaluation initiated.
